titleStmt.title: SII 18.274: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 274. (B.K. No. 167 of 1932-33.) SANGŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Three pieces of a slab in the Bastimaṭṭi.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1317, Yuva, Puśhya śu. Ēkādaśi, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1396, December 23, Thursday. It states that on this day Saṅgama, son of Mallappa a Jaina devotee and son of Śaṅkhadēva who was the son of Muddaṇa-Śrēshṭhi of Pulikara died by the rite of samādhi and that Nēmaṇṇa made a grant of land for offerings to the god Pārśvanātha-svāmi of Saṅgūr in order that merit might accrue to his father and ancestors. Mallappa is stated to be the Sēnādhipati of Mādhava who was governing Gōva when Chakravarti Vīra-Harihara (II), son of Bukkarāja, was ruling and Maṅgapa-Daṇḍanātha was his minister. The village Chaṅgapura (modern Saṅgūr) was granted to Mallappa by Mādhava. Mallappa is also stated to have died by the rite of samādhi on Monday, Phālguṇa ba. chaturdaśi of the year Naḷa and was followed by his four wives. His father as well as his three other sons died by the same rite.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
©śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyātrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . gadya . svastisamastabhuvanavikhyātanikhilapayōdhiparivṛtadvīpasarōjakarnni kāyamānajaṁbūdvīpamadhyavilasitamērubhūOn the top are engraved the following lines:
huligereya mudi Ātana sati dēvāyi
seṭṭiya maga śaṁkhadē-
va
dharadakṣiṇāśāvirājamānabharatakṣētradāryyākhaṁḍadoḷ . kaṁ . śrīvilasitameṁdenipa mahīvaniteya kuṁtaḷaṁ dalenesogayisuguṁ pāvanajanatākīrṇnaṁ bhūviś®tamenisi negaḷdakuṁtaḷadēśaṁ . Ā dēśamadhyadoḷu .
kaṁ . lalitavanamāleyiṁdaṁ jalajākaranikaradiṁde bahucaityag®hāvaḷiyiṁdaṁ karamesevudu pulikarapuramadu surēṁdranamarāvatiyōl . v® . dhareyaṁ śrīraghuvaṁśarāmanarapaṁ tānāḷutirddaṁdu
sāgaradattaṁ baḍadāyava kaṁbubharadoḷu puṭṭirddu lōkakkidaccari tāneṁdene mūrttivetta namalaṁ śrīṣaṁ khadēvaṁ surāsuravaṁdyaṁ nelevettoḍā pulikaraṁ śrītīrtthamāytā gaḷuṁ . Ā purikaradoḷu . kaṁ . sāRead śa.
garadattānvayanakhiḷāgamakōvidanu muddaṇaśrēṣṭhivaraṁ bhūgadhikaṁ sale subagaṁ tyāgi mahābhōgiyāgi sale varttisidaṁ . nutamenipā navilguṁdada patigaḷu ś®takīrtti dēvareṁbācāryyaru sati
yavargge cauḍubāyigaḷa tanuje dēmāyi muddaṇāryakaḷatraṁ . Ātana kumāranakhiḷa mahītaḷasaṁstutya saṁkhadēvaṁ bhuvanakhyātaṁ sa(ṁ)myaktvaguṇōpētaṁ munijana padāṁbujātabhramara[ṁ .]
koṁmaṭadoḷirppanadhikaṁ nirmmaḷa cittaṁ parōpakāravyasanaṁ narmmapatibayicaveggaḍe dharmmagñaṁ negaḷdalōkaveggaḍeya sutaṁ . kṣitivinuta bayicaveggaḍeya tanūbhave sāvibāyi vārijapattāyatanayane saṁkhadē
vana satiyādaḷu pōlguratnamēḷāpakamaṁ . śrīśaṁkhadēvagaṁ mattāsāmāṁbikege jayina mallappa dharādhīśaṁ puṭṭidanātaṁ bhāsuratarakīrttidhavaḷitāśāvaḷeyaṁ . yivaramalagu ṇa

dānapūje sīlānaśana pravaṇannijāṁtyakāladoḷu vitēṣasamādhiyindedivamaṁpaḍedaru . va Antumallināthapitṛgaḷu divamaṁ pugalittalū . kaṁ . śrīvijayanagariyoḷu dharaṇī vallabha bukkarājatanūjaṁ cakravartti śrīvīraOn the top of this piece are engraved the following:— || śaṁkhadēvana maga jainamallappanu || Ā mallappana magaḷu dē[kā]yi || Ā mallappana Arasi gaṁgāyi || Ārasu bāyi || marudēvi || • • • • • banadāyi
hariharaNpanakhiḷāvaniyaṁ pālisuttamirddaṁ sukhadiṁ . v® . saṁgaradhīranapratimavikra manāḷdana cittav®ttiyaṁ piṁgada satyaśaucanidhi maṁtrada maṁdiranūrjjitapratāpaṁ guṇi taṁtrarakṣakanumeṁdu janāvaḷi baṁṇikuṁ
karaṁ maṁgapadaṁḍanāthana guṇāvaḷiyaṁ manamoldu saṁtataṁ . kaṁ . śrīrama hariharanātha manōrathamaṁ biḍade naḍepa pārathi Enalurvvīramaṇige vajraprākāramenalu maṁtri maṁgapaṁ sale ne gaḷdaṁ . va . Antavarssukhadinarasugeyva
kāladoḷu . bhūnutagōvānagarīmahīnāthaṁgatuḷamādhavōrvvīśaṁgaṁ sēnāpati yāgirddaṁ tānadhikatarapratāpanidhi mallappaṁ . tuṁgapratāpi mallappaṁgittaṁ mādhavāṁkanṛpanatimudadiṁ caṁgāpuramaṁ śōbhāliṁgitamaṁ
sakaḷaviśayasukhadāgaramaṁ . v® . cāgigaḷikke bhōgigaḷa maṁdira mattamanōjasaukhya nirvvēgigaḷāśrayaṁ paramayōgigaṇēśavihārabhūmi jaināgamadāgaraṁ caturasāgara meṁdiḷe baṇnikuṁ manōrāgadineyde caṁgapura
maṁ mallikārjjunajanmabhūmiyaṁ . Ā jainamallappaṁge . kaṁ . Āṁganeyaroḷaru nālva rggaṁgāyigaḷarasubāyi marudēvi lasadbhṛṁgāḷaki banadāyigaḷiṁ guṇinigaḷoḷare satiyaravanītaḷadoḷu . Ā mallappamahīśaprēma
tanūjāteyāke dēkāyi lasadbhūmahite sucarita bbratadhāmeyenalkaramene negaḷda ḷavanītaḷadoḷu . Ā jainamallapaṁgaṁ śrījāhnavigaṁ samaṁtu puṭṭidaramalarttē jōnidhigaḷu guṇamaṇibhājanarakalaṁkaramalasa(ṁ)mya
ktvayuttaru . mūvarttanūjaruṁ śubhabhāvaru śrīśaṁkhadēva hariharadēvaṁ bhūvara saṁgamadēvaniḷāvaṁdyaru cārucaritarapratimaguṇar . v® . Udayagirīṁdrado ḷdinapanoldudipaṁtam®tābdhiyalli
kaumudiyudipaṁte mērugiri naṁdanadalli suradrumaṁ sukhapradamudipaṁte saṁgama nṛpaṁ mallikārjjunagarbbhadalli tānudiyisidaṁ vivēkanidhi sadguṇarāsi vineya puṁgavaṁ . Avaroḷage . varaśaṁkhadēvajāyāvare nirupa
me niraticārasubrataratnākare sāmāyige lōkōdaradoḷu doregāṇenakhiḷavanitā vaḷiyoḷu . saṁgamasēnāpatiya kulāṁgane sōmāyi sudati marudēvi surēṁdrāṁganeyaṁ śaciyaṁ jinapuṁgavabhaktiyoḷe
sīladiṁ sale miguvaru . sēnāpatiyuṁ sakaḷamahīnuta śubhacarita cainamallappaṁ tāṁ nānāvidha satpātrada dānave saṁgñānadesakadiṁ varttisidaṁ . va . Āntu kālaṁ saluttamiraloṁdudinaṁ . naḷasaṁvatsara

phālguṇadoḷu bahuḷa caturddaśīndudinadoḷu guttisthaḷadoḷu samādhividhiyiṁ tolagisidaṁ dēhabhāramaṁ mallappaṁ . dēhāvaśānadoḷu tanumōhamanapaharisi tāḷdi saṁnyaśanamanoldā yene lōkaṁ nijagēOn the top of this piece are written the following lines:—
jainamallappana maga śaṁkhadēvanu || Ātanarasi sāmāyi || Ā mallappana maga hariyaṇa || sēnāpati saṁgamanu ||
baiceyeheggaḍe pracura kaṁpiladēvana rājya gōminīlōcanamēghasāramenarātana naṁdane sāubāyge dhairyyācala śaṁkhadēvage ma-
naṁ mige puṭṭida jainamallapaṁ yācakabaṁdhu tattaneya saṁgamanaṁgamanēna baṇnipeṁ ||
To the right To the right of this To the right of this
1 Atana sose kalikA- 1 A saṁgamana a- 3 marudEvi ||
2 lasIte jainamallA- 2 rasiyaru sOmA
3 yi || 3 yi ||
hiṇiyarnnālvaroḍane divamaṁ pokkaṁ . mattomme śaṁkhadēvaṁ tattanayaṁ tanna vanitesāmāyuṁmattuttamasamādhividhiyiṁ pettarssuralōkamaṁ nijāmalabō dharu . surataruvaniḷipa dānōtkaradiṁ śu
bhacaritanāgi varttisi mattā hariharadēvaṁ tāḷdida paramasamādhiyoḷe tanuvaḷiye suranādaṁ [.] tadanaṁtaradoḷu . v® . darśana[v®ddhi] baṁdaḍabhiv®ddhi caritrada siddhipaṁcasadguru padabhaktinirmmaḷaviraktisamunnata
yukti sēvyamādurutarabhūti duḥsatiya bhīti purātanarīti taṁnanādarisidudā balapramukhasaṁgamanalte kṛtārtthapuṁgavaṁ . ślō . Uttaratassuranilayaṁ dakṣiṇatō malayaparvvataṁ yāvatprāThis
gaparōdadhimadhyē nō caturaḥ saṁgamā dhaṁnyaḥ . v® . nēmijinēśvaraṁ tanage daivaviḷānutaśaṁkhadevēne prēmapitāmahaṁ śuk®tadujjugadajjiye sāubāyi nānāmanu jainamallapane taṁde lasadguṇatuṁgagaṁge tā
yiya mahiyalli satyamene saṁgamanoppuvanaṁgajōpamaṁ . jinarājakramapūjanā parikaravyāsaṁganaṁ saṁganaṁ manumārggaprakaṭīkṛtāśaya mahāhārdāṁganaṁ saṁganaṁ janatānaṁda
manīva pāvanaguṇavrōttuṁganaṁ saṁganaṁ manamoldāṁ pogaḷveṁ virōdhikadaḷī mātaṁganaṁ saṁganaṁ . kaṁ . yādavara kulaṁ tuṁgamadādudu nēmīśa mādhava rinucitaśrīyādavakulasaṁ
gamanēdoreyaṁ nēmināthamādhavajanakaṁ . pāvanacaritaṁ vimalayaśōvallabhanamama beḷuvalādityaṁ dāsivēsi paravanitāvyāvarjjitasaṁga saṁgarāṁgaṇasiṁgaṁ . raṇaraṁga paṭukaforvēśyā.
ṭāraṁ triṇētranā tyāgirāyanakalaṁkaguṇāgraṇi ratnatraya mahāmaṇibhūṣaṇanenisi saṁgamāryyaṁ negaḷdaṁ . maname dayārasada tavarmmane vacanaṁ vinayasatyaracanā racitaṁ manucaritasaṁgamāryyana
ghanacāritraṁ parōpakārāyattaṁ . va . Antanēka kālaṁ salluttamire . dhavaḷisi kīrtti caṁdanada carccegaḷiṁ digadhīśarellaraṁ bhuvanamanāgaḷuṁ taṇipi satkṛteyeṁba sudhā pravarṣadiṁ kavigamakipramukhyavibudhāvaḷi
gīpsitamittu barddidaṁ pravaranidēṁ kṛtārtthanele saṁgamadēvaniḷātaḷāgradoḷu . mattamormme . śakakālaṁ sakalaṁkamāge 1317 yuvamabdaṁ puṣyaśuklākhyadā prakaṭaikādaśiyoḷu guruprathitavāraṁ kūḍe pūrvvā
hṇadoḷ sakaḷajñāṁghrisarōjabhṛṁganarikṛdghōrōpasarggaṁ mahādhikasaṁnyāśade biṭṭanaṁbunidhiyoḷtaṁnaṁgamaṁ saṁgamaṁ . tolagisidaṁ nijōbhayaparigrahadoṁdu toḍarppinārppiniṁ calisade
śatṛmitra sukhaduḥkha tanucyuti jīvitaṁgaḷoḷu taḷedu samatvamaṁ paramasaṁnyaśanakkeḍe yāgi dēhadiṁ tolagidanātmabhāvaneyoḷeṁdene saṁgamaniṁ kṛtārttharār . kaṁ . sōmānane sōmāṁga
neyā marudēviyarumirvvarasiyarāgaḷtāmuṁ samādhividhiyiṁdā mariyādeyoḷe kaḷidu pokkarddivamaṁ . Abhinavameṁdenipa mahāvibhavamanāṁtirddu kaḍege saṁnyaśana manāṁtubhayade
divamaṁ pokkaṁdubhayabhavaṁ saphalamādudā saṁgamanā . v® . praje maṟugittu paṁḍita janaṁ beṟagādaṁdu yācakāḷi nīrajamuritāgidaṁtekaḍugaṁdiduvaṁdhakarāge baṁdhugaḷu janara saṁbhramaṁ pari
dudadhṛtivettaranātharaṁjidarbhujagamaḍarddavōlgurujanargguṇi saṁgamanastamāna doḷu . bēḍuvevāraneṁdaḷalitarththijanaṁ dhruvagītajātiyaṁ pāḍuvevāramuṁde nuta gāyakarattudanēka citra
diṁdāḍuvevāramuṁdenuta bāyviḍutirddudu narttakāḷi nāḍāḍiya rūḍhiye sukṛti saṁgamanastamaya dharāgradoḷu . © śrīmadakhilakuśalajanasēvāparāyaṇa sāvaṇa kumāranaparimita paradāraṇa
nipuṇa parākramanudārasatyasaṁdhanagaṇitavitaraṇa guṇagaṇālaṁkṛtanamaladharmmaratha nēmiyenisida nēmaṁṇanu taṁna pitṟupitāmaha prapitāmahādigaḷge sukṛtābhivṛddhi pariprāptiyāgadēkeṁ
du Aniṁdyajñānabaṁdhura saṁgūra pārśvanāthaspāmigaḷamṛtapaḍige tanna pitrādi niṣidhi satkāryyanirvvarttanārthaṁ koṭṭa kṣētraparimiti Ā saṁgūra Ājñēyadikkinali kavaḷageṟeya baḍagaṇa tuṁbi
na keḷage nellagadde maṇuvina koḷaga 15 niṣidhi pūjārtthavāgi koṭṭudu nella gadde koḷaga 5 [Ū]rateṁkaṇa dikkinallikariya keyi koḷaga 4 ciddanabīḍinaśaṁ bhavanāthasvāmigaḷamṛtapaḍige
hāḍūralli koṭṭa kariya keyi koḷaga 20
Digital edition of SII 18.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
